login.title: Connect Spotify
login.subtitle: Control Spotify from your home panel
login.instructionsOpen: Spotify will open to authorize access. After login you'll be redirected — copy the URL from the address bar and paste it below.
login.pasteBody: After login on Spotify, copy the full URL from the browser address bar and paste it below.

player.noTrackHint: Start Spotify on a device, then press ▶

devices.title: Devices
devices.howToBody: Open Spotify on a device (Google Home, phone, PC) and start playing any track. The device will appear here automatically within a few seconds. Tap it to transfer playback to that device.

searchHero.placeholder: What do you want to listen to?

callback.error: Something went wrong while connecting. Go back to the Music page and try again.
